markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Define content strategy for new entity detail guides and healthcare verticals.](https://fathom.video/share/zV23hox9VcyjaEzaz6WJXsyYrzk1uQT-?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Entity Guides:** Create 51 state-specific guides (50 states + DC) to help users find entity details. The "Bottom Line Up Front" (BLUF) structure will provide an immediate answer, with a critical instruction to copy/paste the exact entity name from the Secretary of State (SOS) website to prevent filing errors.](https://fathom.video/share/zV23hox9VcyjaEzaz6WJXsyYrzk1uQT-?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [**Healthcare Content:** The next content cluster will target healthcare, focusing on two key pain points: high state registration volume and the complex compliance of Professional Corporations (PCs) and PLLCs.](https://fathom.video/share/zV23hox9VcyjaEzaz6WJXsyYrzk1uQT-?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
  - [**Project Timeline:** GrowthX begins the entity guides on Monday, targeting a two-week completion. The healthcare cluster will follow, after the current Nexus content is finished.](https://fathom.video/share/zV23hox9VcyjaEzaz6WJXsyYrzk1uQT-?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)

## Topics

### Entity Detail Guides

  - [**Problem:** Users struggle to find the unique identifiers (e.g., entity number, formation date) needed for self-service filings on Discern.](https://fathom.video/share/zV23hox9VcyjaEzaz6WJXsyYrzk1uQT-?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [**Solution:** Create short, scannable guides for all 51 jurisdictions (50 states + DC) showing users how to find this information on the Secretary of State (SOS) website.](https://fathom.video/share/zV23hox9VcyjaEzaz6WJXsyYrzk1uQT-?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [**Content Structure (Ademilade's Proposal):**](https://fathom.video/share/zV23hox9VcyjaEzaz6WJXsyYrzk1uQT-?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
      - [**BLUF Summary:** A top-level paragraph with the immediate answer: "Go to the SOS website and search for your entity name."](https://fathom.video/share/zV23hox9VcyjaEzaz6WJXsyYrzk1uQT-?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
      - [**Summary Table:** A scannable table detailing required info, where to find it, and its expected format (e.g., number of digits).](https://fathom.video/share/zV23hox9VcyjaEzaz6WJXsyYrzk1uQT-?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
      - [**H2 Sections:** Detailed instructions for finding each data point.](https://fathom.video/share/zV23hox9VcyjaEzaz6WJXsyYrzk1uQT-?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
      - [**SOS Links:** Direct links to each state's SOS business search page.](https://fathom.video/share/zV23hox9VcyjaEzaz6WJXsyYrzk1uQT-?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
      - [**CTA:** A final section on onboarding entities to Discern.](https://fathom.video/share/zV23hox9VcyjaEzaz6WJXsyYrzk1uQT-?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [**Critical Instruction:** Guides must advise users to **copy and paste** the exact entity name from the SOS website.](https://fathom.video/share/zV23hox9VcyjaEzaz6WJXsyYrzk1uQT-?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Minor variations (e.g., "Discern Inc." vs. "Discern, Inc.") are treated as different legal entities by the state, causing filing rejections.](https://fathom.video/share/zV23hox9VcyjaEzaz6WJXsyYrzk1uQT-?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)

### Healthcare Content Strategy

  - [**Target Audience:** Healthcare businesses, which are typically more heavily regulated and require more state registrations.](https://fathom.video/share/zV23hox9VcyjaEzaz6WJXsyYrzk1uQT-?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [**Key Pain Points Discern Solves:**](https://fathom.video/share/zV23hox9VcyjaEzaz6WJXsyYrzk1uQT-?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
      - [**High Entity Volume:** Physical healthcare models (e.g., urgent care) require many legal entities (e.g., PCs) for each location, creating a significant compliance burden.](https://fathom.video/share/zV23hox9VcyjaEzaz6WJXsyYrzk1uQT-?tab=summary&timestamp=894.0)
      - [**Complex Entity Types:** Professional Corporations (PCs) and Professional Limited Liability Companies (PLLCs) are poorly served by the industry, leading to frequent compliance issues.](https://fathom.video/share/zV23hox9VcyjaEzaz6WJXsyYrzk1uQT-?tab=summary&timestamp=894.0)
  - [**Proposed Content Buckets:**](https://fathom.video/share/zV23hox9VcyjaEzaz6WJXsyYrzk1uQT-?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)
      - [General Healthcare Compliance](https://fathom.video/share/zV23hox9VcyjaEzaz6WJXsyYrzk1uQT-?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)
      - [Home Healthcare Businesses](https://fathom.video/share/zV23hox9VcyjaEzaz6WJXsyYrzk1uQT-?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)
      - [Professional Corporation (PC) Compliance](https://fathom.video/share/zV23hox9VcyjaEzaz6WJXsyYrzk1uQT-?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)
      - [Professional Limited Liability Company (PLLC) Compliance](https://fathom.video/share/zV23hox9VcyjaEzaz6WJXsyYrzk1uQT-?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:** Begin writing the 51 entity detail guides on Monday, targeting a two-week completion.](https://fathom.video/share/zV23hox9VcyjaEzaz6WJXsyYrzk1uQT-?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Finalize the content strategy for the healthcare cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/zV23hox9VcyjaEzaz6WJXsyYrzk1uQT-?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Schedule a follow-up call with Ademilade to review healthcare content templates before starting work.](https://fathom.video/share/zV23hox9VcyjaEzaz6WJXsyYrzk1uQT-?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
